nasb.text: Then behold, an old man was coming out of the field from his work at evening. Now the man was from the hill country of Ephraim, and he was staying in Gibeah, but the men of the place were Benjamites.

esv.text: And behold, an old man was coming from his work in the field at evening. The man was from the hill country of Ephraim, and he was sojourning in Gibeah. The men of the place were Benjaminites.

cnv.text: 到晚上，有一個老年人從田間工作回來；那人原是以法蓮山地的人，寄居在基比亞；那地方的人卻是便雅憫人。

ccb.text: 那时，有一个老人从田间工作回来，经过那里。他本来是以法莲山区的人，现在住在便雅悯境内的基比亚。
